contexts.context: Dr. John Brown was born at <mark>Rothbury</mark>, in the county of Northumberland, in 1715...
...was a native of Scotland, and Curate of <mark>Rothbury</mark>; and afterwards collated to a vicarage in Cumberland...
...born in the market town and civil parish of <mark>Rothbury</mark> in northeast England in 1715. Brown's father...
